response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer, but their profile does not match this role's core requirements. C++ experience is limited to a ~6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015 and a university thesis project, far short of the mandatory 5–10 years of hands-on Windows C++ development. There is no SQL Server or Oracle experience listed (MongoDB/MySQL only), and no fixed-income or capital-markets domain background beyond a brief fintech role (RIDE Capital) that used Node/TypeScript. The mismatch on all mandatory criteria outweighs the candidate's otherwise solid engineering fundamentals.
strengths: Broad, long-tenured software engineering experience across web, backend, and systems work
Strong craftsmanship practices: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, and open-source contributions
Experience with low-latency, high-throughput systems (millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
concerns: Minimal professional C++ experience (~6 months, a decade ago) versus the required 5–10 years
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MongoDB/MySQL
No fixed-income, derivatives, or capital-markets domain expertise

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering and CI/CD fundamentals
